case_title: MIGUEL GOMEZ LOPEZ VS. PAUL TIEU FAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ LOPEZ, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT FAN, PAUL TIEU , (AKA) PAUL FAN, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA P F CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ LOPEZ, MIGUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAN, PAUL TIEU , (AKA) PAUL FAN, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA P F CONSTRUCTION $30,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,271.24 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,721.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
